summary: Complaint patterns involving headings, skip links, empty links, redundant adjacent links, linked-image purpose, new-window warnings, linked-image alternative text, and menu state announcements.
core_phrase_patterns: heading hierarchy was not properly defined
heading hierarchy on the website was not properly defined
missing heading level 1
heading levels were missing
skip to content link was not implemented
empty links that contain no text
empty links contain no text
function or purpose of the link was not presented to the user
function or purpose of the link to not be presented to the user
redundant links where adjacent links go to the same URL address
adjacent links go to the same URL address
redundant links result in additional navigation and repetition
interactive images used as links did not describe the content of the link target
interactive images used as links did not describe the link target
image links did not describe the content of the link target
links opened new windows without prior warning
product images lacked alternative text
product image links lacked alternative text
linked images lacked alternative text
social media links did not have appropriate alternative text
navigation sub-menus with drop-down lists did not announce collapsed state
navigation sub-menus with drop-down lists did not announce expanded state
